concerns.text: T009 (download) → T010 (parse) is a producer-consumer relationship but both are marked [P]. T010 cannot run in parallel with T009; it depends on T009's output artifact (data/raw/knot_atlas_export.csv). Remove [P] from T010-T016.

T017-T019 (compute invariants) are marked [P] and can run in parallel, but T020-T025 (flag/validate/analyze) depend on T017-T019's output. T020-T025 should NOT be marked [P]. Exploratory analysis (T023-T025) requires computed invariants first.
T026-T028 (implement regression models) can run [P], but T029-T039 (VIF, residual analysis, validation, ANOVA, effect sizes) all depend on fitted models from T026-T028. Remove [P] from T029-T039.
T040-T043 (edge case handling implementations) can be [P], but T044-T048 (derivation notes, validation status, logs) depend on all prior phase outputs. Remove [P] from T044-T048.

User Story 2 section states 'Depends on User Story 1 completion (requires parsed dataset)' but T017-T019 are marked [P] as if they can start immediately. Clarify that [P] applies only within US2 after US1 completes, not across stories.

Parallel example shows T009 and T010 launching together, but T010 needs T009's downloaded file. This contradicts the producer-consumer reality. Update example to show sequential download→parse, then parallel parse→filter→validate.
